View on GitHub
Python · Async · v2.2.2

SpankBang API

A fully asynchronous Python API wrapper and scraper for SpankBang. Fetch videos, metadata, search, and iterate over channels, creators, or pornstars. Download content using HLS or direct RAW MP4 downloads. Powered by the eaf_base_api networking engine.

$ pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-spankbang git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api 📋
GitHub →
⚠️ Legal Disclaimer
This tool is an unofficial, independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the target website. This software is provided "as is" for educational and personal purposes only. The developer assumes no responsibility for any consequences arising from the use of this tool, including but not limited to account suspension, IP blocking, or any violation of the target website's Terms of Service. Users are solely responsible for ensuring their use complies with all applicable laws and policies. Use at your own risk.
💚 Support & Commercial Licensing
If you find this project helpful, please consider donating to support its continued development!

💎 Donate Crypto
Other Options:
• PayPal
• Ko-Fi

For extended features, enterprise integrations, or custom commercial licensing, please contact EchterAlsFakeBS@proton.me.

✨ Features Overview

  • ⚡ Fully Asynchronous — High-performance scraping and downloading via asyncio and curl_cffi.
  • 🛡️ Bot Protection Bypass — Mimics real browser TLS fingerprints to bypass bot protection.
  • 📥 Flexible Downloads — Support for both HLS streamed downloads (using DownloadConfigHLS) and direct CDN MP4 downloads (using DownloadConfigRAW).
  • 🔍 Scraping & Filtering — Extract video listings by query, sorted by date, quality, duration, or search filter. Scrape details for channels, creators, and pornstars.

📦 Installation

Note: Temporary Installation Workaround
This manual Git installation is temporarily needed to workaround issues on PyPI and will be fixed the next days.

Install from PyPI using pip:

bash
pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-spankbang
pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api

For TS→MP4 remuxing support (recommended for HLS downloads), install with the optional av dependency:

bash
pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/unofficial-api-for-spankbang[av]
pip install git+https://github.com/EchterAlsFake/eaf_base_api
Note
Requires Python ≥ 3.12. The underlying networking library eaf_base_api is installed automatically as a dependency.

🚀 Quick Start

Every method in this API is asynchronous. You need to run your code inside an async function:

python
import asyncio
from spankbang_api import Client

async def main():
    client = Client()

    # Fetch a video
    video = await client.get_video("https://spankbang.com/...")

    # Access metadata
    print(video.title)
    print(video.length)
    print(video.video_qualities)

    # Download the video using HLS (default)
    from base_api import DownloadConfigHLS
    config = DownloadConfigHLS(quality="best", path="./downloads")
    await video.download(configuration_hls=config, use_hls=True)

asyncio.run(main())

⚙️ Configuration

The entire API relies on eaf_base_api for its networking. You can configure global settings (proxies, timeouts, etc.) via a custom BaseCore passed into the Client.

Please refer to the eaf_base_api Documentation for the complete reference on how to set up RuntimeConfig and properly integrate it with this API.

python
from base_api import BaseCore
from base_api.modules.config import RuntimeConfig
from spankbang_api import Client

my_config = RuntimeConfig()
my_config.proxies = {"https": "socks5://127.0.0.1:9050"}

core = BaseCore(configuration=my_config)
client = Client(core=core)

🔌 Client

The Client class manages the network session, cookies, and HTTP headers to interact with SpankBang. It serves as the primary entry point to retrieve video details, explore profile channels/pornstars/creators, and run search queries.

python
from spankbang_api import Client
from base_api import BaseCore

client = Client()

# Or construct with custom core configuration
client_custom = Client(core=BaseCore())

Constructor Parameters

  • core BaseCore — Networking core instance (default: BaseCore(RuntimeConfig()))

Methods

Fetch Video get_video()

async
Fetches a video page and returns a populated Video object. Parses Javascript variables containing HLS master playlists and direct MP4 resolutions.
await client.get_video( url: str, load_html: bool = True ) -> Video

Parameters

  • url str — The full SpankBang video URL
  • load_html bool — If True (default), fetches and parses the HTML page for metadata

Returns

→ Video

Fetch Channel get_channel()

async
Fetches a channel profile page and returns a populated Channel object.
await client.get_channel( url: str, load_html: bool = True ) -> Channel

Parameters

  • url str — The full SpankBang channel URL
  • load_html bool — If True (default), parses the profile HTML for metadata

Returns

→ Channel

Fetch Pornstar get_pornstar()

async
Fetches a pornstar profile page and returns a populated Pornstar object.
await client.get_pornstar( url: str, load_html: bool = True ) -> Pornstar

Parameters

  • url str — The full SpankBang pornstar URL
  • load_html bool — If True (default), parses the profile HTML for metadata

Returns

→ Pornstar

Fetch Creator get_creator()

async
Fetches a creator profile page and returns a populated Creator object.
await client.get_creator( url: str, load_html: bool = True ) -> Creator

Parameters

  • url str — The full SpankBang creator URL
  • load_html bool — If True (default), parses the profile HTML

Returns

→ Creator

Search Videos search()

async
Performs a search query for videos with options to filter by rating, quality, duration, and upload date. Yields results paginated. See Search & Filtering.
async for result in client.search( query: any, filter: Literal["trending", "new", "featured", "popular"] | None = None, quality: Literal["hd", "fhd", "uhd"] | None = None, duration: Literal["10", "20", "40"] | None = None, date: Literal["d", "w", "m", "y"] | None = None, pages: int = 2, videos_concurrency: int | None = None, pages_concurrency: int | None = None, on_video_error: on_error_hint = on_error, on_page_error: on_error_hint = None, keep_original_order: bool = False, load_html: bool = False ) -> ScrapeResult

Parameters

  • query str — Search query keywords
  • filter str | None — Filter order: "trending", "new", "featured", "popular"
  • quality str | None — Quality filter: "hd" (720p), "fhd" (1080p), "uhd" (4k)
  • duration str | None — Duration limits: "10" (10+ min), "20" (20+ min), "40" (40+ min)
  • date str | None — Upload date range: "d" (day), "w" (week), "m" (month), "y" (year)
  • pages int — Number of pages to iterate (default: 2)

Returns

→ AsyncGenerator[ScrapeResult]

🎬 Video

dataclass Inherits from BaseMedia. Represents a single SpankBang video. Populated with metadata from parsed Javascript configurations (stream_data) on the page and standard HTML tags.

Attributes

AttributeTypeDescription
urlstrThe video page URL
titlestr | NoneVideo title
descriptionstr | NoneDescription metadata content
thumbnailstr | NoneVideo preview cover image URL
tagslist | NoneList of tags/categories
authorstr | NoneAuthor / channel publisher name
imagestr | NoneAuthor profile thumbnail / image alt text
ratingstr | NoneUpvote percentage (e.g. 92%)
lengthstr | NoneLength in seconds
m3u8_base_urlstr | NoneHLS master playlist URL
direct_download_urlslist | NoneCDN-resolved direct MP4 URLs
video_qualitieslist | NoneSorted list of available resolution heights (e.g. ["240", "320", "480", "720", "1080"])
Scraper Iterator Fallback Attributes
tagstr | NonePrimary search tag associated with the item
viewsstr | NoneView count string from the listing card
resolutionstr | NoneMaximum resolution badge from listing card
video_source_urlstr | NoneRaw listing element fallbacks

Methods

Download Video download()

async
Downloads the video. Supports downloading via HLS segments (default) or fetching direct CDN MP4 files depending on the use_hls parameter.
await video.download( configuration_hls: DownloadConfigHLS | None = None, configuration_raw: DownloadConfigRAW | None = None, use_hls: bool = True ) -> bool | DownloadReport

Parameters

  • configuration_hls DownloadConfigHLS | None — Config options for HLS segment downloads. Used if use_hls=True.
  • configuration_raw DownloadConfigRAW | None — Config options for direct file downloads. Used if use_hls=False.
  • use_hls bool — Download via HLS (default: True). Set False to download via raw MP4 links.

Returns

→ bool | DownloadReport

⭐ Pornstar / Channel / Creator

dataclass Inherits from PornstarHelper → BaseMedia. Under the hood, SpankBang profiles for Pornstar, Channel, and Creator share the same attributes and methods via a common base class.

Attributes

AttributeTypeDescription
urlstrThe profile base URL
namestr | NoneName of the pornstar, channel, or creator
video_countstr | NoneTotal uploaded/featured videos
views_countstr | NoneTotal profile views
subscribers_countstr | NoneTotal subscriber count
imagestr | NoneProfile avatar cover image URL

Methods

Get Profile Videos videos()

async
Asynchronously yields video items listed on this profile, navigating page-by-page.
async for result in profile.videos( pages: int = 0, videos_concurrency: int | None = None, pages_concurrency: int | None = None, on_video_error: on_error_hint = on_error, on_page_error: on_error_hint = None, keep_original_order: bool = False, load_html: bool = False ) -> ScrapeResult

Parameters

  • pages int — Number of extra pages to fetch (0 means only the main page URL)

Returns

→ AsyncGenerator[ScrapeResult]

🔍 Search & Filtering

Perform advanced searches on SpankBang by passing filter keywords to the `client.search()` generator:

python
# Search for popular 1080p videos uploaded this week
async for result in client.search(
    query="college",
    filter="popular",
    quality="fhd",     # 1080p resolution
    date="w",           # weekly
    pages=3
):
    if result.is_success:
        print(result.video.title, result.video.url)

Filter Parameters Map

Sort/Filter (filter)

ValueDescription
"trending"Trending videos (Default option)
"new"Most recent videos
"featured"Featured videos
"popular"Most popular videos

Quality (quality)

ValueTarget Quality
"hd"High Definition (720p)
"fhd"Full High Definition (1080p)
"uhd"Ultra High Definition (4k resolution)

Duration (duration)

ValueTarget Range
"10"Videos longer than 10 minutes
"20"Videos longer than 20 minutes
"40"Videos longer than 40 minutes

Date Range (date)

ValueTimeline
"d"Uploaded today
"w"Uploaded this week
"m"Uploaded this month
"y"Uploaded this year

⬇️ Downloading Options

SpankBang supports dual download configurations. Under the hood, the master playlist contains an HLS stream, but direct CDN links are also extracted if you prefer RAW MP4 chunked downloading.

HLS Download (Recommended)

HLS provides highly reliable stream downloads, slicing chunked `.ts` packages and remuxing them to `.mp4` via PyAV:

python
from base_api import DownloadConfigHLS

config = DownloadConfigHLS(
    quality="best",
    path="./downloads"
)
success = await video.download(configuration_hls=config, use_hls=True)

RAW CDN Download

RAW downloads request full files directly from SpankBang's media CDN servers, leveraging HTTP range requests to speed up the process across parallel workers:

python
from base_api import DownloadConfigRAW

config = DownloadConfigRAW(
    quality="best",          # "best", "half", "worst"
    path="./downloads",
    allow_multipart=True,
    max_workers=5
)
success = await video.download(configuration_raw=config, use_hls=False)

📄 Pagination & Iterators

All listings (such as client.search() and profile.videos()) yield a wrapper class called ScrapeResult:

python
async for result in client.search("solo", pages=2):
    if result.is_success:
        video = result.video
        print(video.title)
    else:
        print(f"Failed URL {result.url} due to: {result.error}")

ScrapeResult Properties

AttributeTypeDescription
urlstrThe video item page URL
videoVideo | NonePopulated Video instance (if successful)
errorException | NoneError exception (if failed)
is_successboolScraping status indicator

⚠️ Error Handling

Custom exceptions are exported by spankbang_api.modules.errors. Connection failures and proxy issues bubble up from eaf_base_api exceptions.

ExceptionTrigger Cause
NotFoundServer returned HTTP 404 (e.g. video deleted)
NetworkErrorRequest failed due to client/server networking parameters
BotDetectionCloudflare challenge block detected
ProxyErrorProxy connection failed
VideoIsProcessingThe video is still processing on SpankBang's servers
VideoUnavailableVideo stream is unavailable from SpankBang
DownloadFailedThe downloader encountered an error during download
python
from spankbang_api.modules.errors import VideoIsProcessing, NotFound

try:
    video = await client.get_video(url)
except VideoIsProcessing:
    print("This video is still processing!")
except NotFound:
    print("Video no longer exists.")

🖥️ Supported Platforms

PlatformArchitectureStatus
Windows 11x64✅ Tested
macOS Sequoiax86_64✅ Tested
Linux (Arch)x86_64✅ Tested
Android 16aarch64✅ Tested
